---
title: "Exercise — SDTM: Findings (Labs & Vital Signs)"
---

## Goal

Build the Vital Signs (VS) domain slice — the structural twin of the LB
domain from [The Findings session](../sessions/sdtm-findings.qmd) — and
handle its one deliberate difference from LB.

## Setup

TODO (written with the Findings session): starting code reading
`data/raw/vs_raw.csv` and `data/sdtm/dm.csv`.

## Task

TODO (written with the Findings session). Planned:

1. Build the VS result quartet (`VSORRES`/`VSORRESU`/`VSSTRESC`/
   `VSSTRESN`/`VSSTRESU`), noting that `VSORRESU` uses the `VSRESU`
   codelist, **not** the generic `UNIT` codelist that LB uses — and
   check the units against the right codelist.
2. Derive `VSDY` and identify each subject's baseline row.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] TODO

> Solutions are in the paid tier.
